name: virtualagency-os-site
description: Static site + insights generator for virtualagency-os.com

scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:governance && node scripts/validate_insights.js && node scripts/validate_fanout_warning.js && node scripts/validate_answer_coverage.js && node scripts/validate_entity_coverage.js && node scripts/validate_internal_links.js && node scripts/validate_sitemap_coverage.js
scripts.build: node scripts/add_answer_schema.js && node scripts/build_insights.js && node scripts/apply_fanout.js && node scripts/update_redirects_clean_to_html.js && node scripts/update_sitemap_all_html.js && node scripts/generate_citation_release_plan.js
scripts.validate:governance: node scripts/validate_strategy_gate.js && node scripts/validate_master_plan_completion.js && node scripts/validate_validator_registry.js && node scripts/validate_canonical_routes.js && node scripts/validate_priority_pages.js && node scripts/validate_homepage_ctas.js && node scripts/validate_backlink_remediation.js && node scripts/validate_release_plan.js
scripts.release:self-heal: npm run build && npm run release:deep-validate:isolated && npm run validate:all
scripts.build:seo: node scripts/add_answer_schema.js && node scripts/update_redirects_clean_to_html.js && node scripts/update_sitemap_all_html.js && node scripts/generate_citation_release_plan.js
